sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ فَيْصَلٌ إِلَى المَكْتَبِ فِي السَّابِعَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Fajsal je stigao u kancelariju u sedam ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Faisal arrived at the office at seven in the morning.

sentences.translation: Pozdravio je kolege i popio svoju kafu.
sentences.translationEn: He greeted his colleagues and drank his coffee.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je računar i počeo čitati poruke.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the computer and started reading messages.

sentences.translation: Dan je bio miran i organizovan.
sentences.translationEn: The day was calm and organized.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ بِالرَّاحَةِ لِأَنَّهُ أَنْهَى عَمَلَهُ مُبَكِّرًا.
sentences.translation: Osjetio se opušteno jer je završio posao rano.
sentences.translationEn: He felt relaxed because he finished his work early.
